description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the adoptopenjdk/maven-openjdk11 Docker image, defines a MAVEN_OPTS variable to set the local repository to .m2/repository, and caches the .m2/repository and target/ directories. Define two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a build job that runs mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS compile. In the test stage add a test job that runs mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS test. No specific rules, artifacts, or deployment targets are configured.
